productDisplayName: Basics Men Blue Slim Fit Checked Shirt
description: Composition Black, white and aqua blue check shirt made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar, buttoned front placket, patch pockets on the chest with buttoned flaps, brand tab on the left pocket, and a curved hemline Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach Hang dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on print or embroidery The cleverly mitired double patch pockets on the chest and bold colours add rugged styling to this check shirt from basics, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Team it with jeans and sneakers. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'11' and shoulders 17.5"
